caption:
OpenAI has launched the GPT-5.5-Cyber model, which surpasses Anthropic's Mythos in cybersecurity benchmarks. This initiative includes a new Codex Security plugin and a partnership with over 25 security firms. 68012

How will this impact cybersecurity?

Sources: The Decoder, OpenAI

plan.caption:
OpenAI has launched the GPT-5.5-Cyber model, which surpasses Anthropic's Mythos in cybersecurity benchmarks. This initiative includes a new Codex Security plugin and a partnership with over 25 security firms. 68012

How will this impact cybersecurity?

Sources: The Decoder, OpenAI

#OpenAI #Cybersecurity #AI #TechNews #Innovation #GPT55 #Mythos #CodexSecurity #Partnership #CyberDefense #AIModels

slides.headline: OPENAI'S GPT-5.5-CYBER OUTPERFORMS ANTHROPIC'S MYTHOS IN SECURITY TESTS
slides.sub: This new model sets records on key cybersecurity benchmarks.
slides.image_prompt: A sleek modern cybersecurity operation room with glowing screens, displaying complex data analysis, a diverse team of cybersecurity experts collaborating, and high-tech equipment.

slides.headline: OVER 30 MILLION COMMITS SCANNED BY CODX SECURITY PLUGIN
slides.sub: The plugin flagged over 500,000 findings as fixed automatically.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up of a developer's hands typing on a laptop, surrounded by code snippets on the screen and a coffee cup, showcasing a focused work environment.

slides.headline: OPENAI PARTNERS WITH 25 SECURITY FIRMS FOR BETTER PROTECTION
slides.sub: The partner network aims to enhance cybersecurity across various sectors.
slides.image_prompt: A diverse group of professionals in a meeting room, discussing cybersecurity strategies with charts and graphs on a screen, highlighting teamwork and collaboration.

slides.headline: NEW DEEP SCANS AND PATCH GENERATION AUTOMATION INTRODUCED
slides.sub: The updated Codex plugin automates patch creation and verification.
slides.image_prompt: A futuristic workspace with advanced technology, showing a large screen displaying cybersecurity analytics and a person analyzing data with a thoughtful expression.

slides.headline: GPT-5.5-CYBER COULD SIGNIFICANTLY IMPROVE PATCHING EFFICIENCY
slides.sub: This model enhances the process of finding and fixing software flaws.
slides.image_prompt: A conceptual image of a digital shield representing cybersecurity, with flowing data streams and binary code in the background, symbolizing protection and technology.

story.title: OpenAI says new GPT-5.5-Cyber outperforms Anthropic's Mythos on cybersecurity benchmark
